instructions: Older British male. Refined received pronunciation — warm baritone with a slight rasp of age. Measured, deliberate pacing with thoughtful pauses. Dry wit delivered quietly, never performed. The manner of an eccentric scholar who finds the garden genuinely fascinating — calm authority, understated intelligence, and a hint of amusement at the world. Never rushed, never clinical, never young.

notes.model: gpt-4o-mini-tts supports instructions parameter for voice character shaping
notes.voice: Options: alloy, ash, ballad, coral, echo, fable, nova, onyx, sage, shimmer, verse. onyx = deep and measured.
notes.format: mp3 for maximum iOS/Safari compatibility. opus = lower latency but less browser support.
